title: Mother of all Sheep - Shed Wool
description: Simple mod that makes sheep shed wool
body:
Makes sheep shed wool based on their color.


There's a config file where you can set if all sheep should shed their wool or if only named ones are. Default is named sheep only.
You can also set how many ticks should shedding takes place. Default is 3 minutes (3600 ticks).


Server side only.


Follow me on FB, Twitter and Twitch: 
https://fb.gg/mangdags
https://twitter.com/MangDags
https://twitch.tv/mangdags

This is my first mod and made it within a day, so there might be bugs and unwanted results so be aware.
